personal.name: Raju Bera
personal.title: Senior IT Support Engineer
personal.bio: IT professional with 8+ years of hands-on experience in technical support, system administration, and IT operations. Skilled in managing enterprise infrastructure, cloud services (AWS, Azure), and end-user support — from troubleshooting and system upgrades to network configuration and application support. Passionate about solving complex problems and keeping IT operations running smoothly. AWS Certified SysOps Administrator and Cloud Practitioner.

items.name: AWS (EC2, S3, IAM, VPC, EBS, RDS, ELB, Auto Scaling, CloudWatch), Microsoft Azure, Azure AD
Docker, Jira, Confluence, Bitbucket, Git, GitHub, PowerShell Scripting, ManageEngine Endpoint Central
Remote Desktop, MobaXterm, PuTTY, UltraViewer, TeamViewer, AnyDesk, AWS CloudWatch ,Site 24*7 , UptimeRobot
User/License Management, Mailbox & Mail Flow, MFA & Security, SharePoint & OneDrive, Teams Administration
NVR & Camera Configuration, RFID (Fastag), PTZ Camera, TMS/ATMS, Emergency Call Box (ECB)

experience.description: nstallation & Customer Support Engineer responsible for deploying, configuring, and supporting Toll Management Systems (TMS),  Parking Management Systems (PMS), and networking infrastructure. Delivered on-site implementation, system testing, hardware configuration, application support, and customer issue resolution across multiple client locations while ensuring high system availability and operational efficiency.
responsibilities: Installed, configured, and maintained Toll Management System (TMS) and Electronic Ticketing & Parking Management System (PMS) solutions.
Deployed Windows operating systems and configured client systems using Windows Deployment Services (WDS).
Installed and configured routers, Layer 2/Layer 3 managed switches, access points, NVRs, IP cameras, RFID readers, and networking equipment.
Configured FASTag RFID readers, Automatic Vehicle Classifier (AVC), boom barriers, IR sensors, and Emergency Call Box (ECB) devices for toll operations.
Performed installation, configuration, testing, and commissioning of toll plaza infrastructure and networking devices.
Monitored and supported ticketing, parking, and toll management applications, identifying and reporting software defects to the development team.
Troubleshot application issues including payment failures, ticket generation problems, and system performance issues.
Performed functional and user acceptance testing (UAT) for new software releases before production deployment.
Monitored application servers and ensured continuous availability of ticketing and toll management services.
Prepared and submitted daily operational status reports and incident reports to client management.
Provided on-site technical support, preventive maintenance, and issue resolution while coordinating directly with customers.
Worked with clients including L&T, BK Sons, Montecarlo, and Iron Triangle Limited across multiple project locations.
Supported networking infrastructure and ensured reliable connectivity between servers, client systems, cameras, and field devices.
Diagnosed and resolved hardware, software, and network-related issues to minimize operational downtime.

experience.description: Senior IT Support Engineer with extensive experience in enterprise IT operations, system administration, endpoint management, Microsoft 365 administration, identity and access management, cloud infrastructure support, and IT automation. Responsible for managing enterprise applications, Atlassian administration, endpoint security, AWS-hosted infrastructure, patch management, and user lifecycle management. Experienced in automating routine IT operations using PowerShell and ensuring secure, reliable, and highly available IT services while maintaining SLA compliance.
responsibilities: Manage enterprise IT infrastructure, endpoint security, and system administration across on-premises and cloud environments.
Administer Atlassian Cloud (Jira, Confluence) including user management, permissions, groups, billing, workflows, plugins, and project administration.
Manage Microsoft 365 administration including Exchange Online, SharePoint Online, Microsoft Teams, Entra ID (Azure AD), distribution lists, shared mailboxes, and user licensing.
Handle complete user onboarding and offboarding, including account provisioning, permission assignment, license allocation, data backup, and access revocation.
Administer identity and access management using Microsoft Entra ID (Azure AD) with role-based access control and security best practices.
Manage centralized endpoint administration using ManageEngine Endpoint Central, including software deployment, patch management, vulnerability remediation, asset management, and remote support.
Plan and execute monthly server and application patching to maintain security, compliance, and system stability.
Monitor enterprise infrastructure, AWS-hosted applications, endpoint services, ISP connectivity, and firewall alerts to ensure high availability.
Perform application upgrades, version management, and infrastructure maintenance for enterprise platforms.
Manage IT assets, software inventory, and lifecycle tracking using Snipe-IT.
Support GitHub repositories, access management, and collaboration for development teams.
Ensure Jira Service Management tickets are resolved within SLA while maintaining high service quality.
Coordinate with vendors for hardware procurement, warranty claims, repairs, and service escalations.
Develop and maintain technical documentation, SOPs, operational procedures, and knowledge base articles.
Automate repetitive administrative tasks using PowerShell scripts to improve operational efficiency.
Support security audits, software compliance, and IT governance initiatives.
Provide advanced technical support for Windows, networking, Microsoft 365, cloud services, and enterprise applications.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to troubleshoot complex infrastructure and app

projects.title: E-Ticketing & E-Parking Management System (PMS)
projects.description: QR-code based e-ticketing and parking management system deployed at Kolkata Science City, with automated turnstile access control.
projects.details: Implemented for Vaaan Infra Pvt. Ltd. at the Kolkata Science City site. Visitors' QR-code tickets are scanned at entry points, and turnstiles respond automatically based on scan validation. Responsible for troubleshooting ticketing and Parking Management System (PMS) issues, maintaining all networking devices on-site, and sending daily status reports to the client.
highlights: QR-code based automated ticket scanning and turnstile access
Daily reporting and issue resolution for client operations

projects.title: Endpoint Central Infrastructure Setup & AWS Application Hosting
projects.description: Set up and manage Endpoint Central infrastructure on AWS for client Purvasa Group, hosting their application and providing ongoing server management, monitoring, and support.
projects.details: Purbasha Group is an external client whose application is built, hosted, and supported by our team on our own AWS platform. Set up Endpoint Central infrastructure endpoints in AWS to enable centralized management of the application. Trained the client's IT personnel on how to centrally manage and monitor the application through Endpoint Central. Own end-to-end server management for the hosted environment, including proactive monitoring of resource utilization — investigating and resolving root causes whenever CPU/memory/storage usage spikes. Handle deployment of application updates and new feature releases as they become available. Provide ongoing technical support to the Purbasha Group team for any application or infrastructure issues they raise.
highlights: Deployed and configured Endpoint Central infrastructure on AWS for centralized client application management
Trained client IT staff on centralized management workflows
Proactive server monitoring and root-cause resolution for high resource utilization
Managed rollout of application updates and new feature releases
Ongoing client support for application and infrastructure issues
